title: 係時候發揮我地香港人嘅雙語能力 - We should discuss bilingually

replies.msg:
我知咁樣聽落好撚on鳩，但係如果我地真係想個世界聽到我地講咩, 我諗我哋所有野都要開用雙語mode.

I know this sounds really stupid, but if we want the world to truly hear us, we have to speak bilingually.

1. 我地唔用英文，外國記者自然又要搵人做翻譯 , 所有野都有好大滯後，所有野都無一手料。香港作為中共唯一洗錢中心同唯一已發展地區、敢直接對中共說不的族群(除左美國)，世界上好多人對香港好有興趣，用多d英文對我地百利而無一害。

1. If the information is only available in Chinese, foreign journalists only have access to limited first-hand information and there will be severe time lag due to the translation. Hong Kong is the only developed international laundering hub under PRC governance. The people in Hong Kong dare to say no to the PRC directly (except the States) - what’s going on in this place should be of interest to a lot of people. There is no harm to speak bilingually.

2. 停止同溫層互打飛機，基本上我地可以再reach out 嘅一係外媒，一係就係藍絲。你覺得邊邊影響力大啲 ?

Stop feeling freaking good about ourselves and staying in our small echo chamber - reach out! Beyond our own bubble, we either further reach out to the foreign press, or the pro-PRC supporters. Who are more influential?

3. 你可能覺得好撚麻煩, 但班五毛風向狗都係一樣，要轉打英文。今日可能出一個post 只係需要5秒，收5 毛，要搵班識英文嘅，出post帶風向, 你覺得需要比多幾多錢同時間？5蚊一個post?

You may say that's hell inconvenient, but that applies to those PRC henchmen as well! It may cost only 5 seconds and 5 cents right now. How much more time and money would it cost for a henchmen to write a bilingual post? 5 dollar each ?

4. 減輕攬炒巴等文宣負擔
This would reduce the workload of our publicity teams.

講到尾, 一可練英文，二可顯示到我地係有讀過書唔係文盲。
最緊要係令世界知道中共並無因為發展而擺脫其野蠻本性。
如果不及時阻止，香港唔係第一位受害者，更加唔會係最後一位....

After all, there is no harm to get familiar with another language, right? Not to mention that we can show them that we are well educated than their minions and have a stake in this society.

The most important thing is to let the world realize that PRC is and will not change its barbaric character despite the rapid economic developments in recent years.

If we do not stop them now, HK will be the victim, not the first one, and certainly not the last.

P.S.

致親愛的連登仔女:
用英文真係唔撚洗怕醜怕尷尬。你班人棍又捱過，催淚彈又索過，子彈又食過，連人地個咩都夠膽錫，仲有咩好怕醜?

There is no need to be embarrassed when using broken English. You have been beaten like shit, bitten tear gases, bullets and kissed ??? - what is more to be embarrassed about?

_

致親愛的殖民者，請唔好妄想可以繼續肆意欺凌香港人之餘，仲可以利用香港做你對白手套。香港年青人已經是民不畏死，何以懼之的境地。你唯一在乎的洗錢天堂，定當同你痛恨的香港人一起香消玉殞。我地寧爲玉碎，不作瓦全 。

As for our dear colonists, please stop fantasising that you can harm us with impunity and keep this city as your white gloves. The future stakeholders here have nothing to fear since they are already not afraid of death. Please bear in mind that your one-and-only concerned laundering hub will vanish when you try to cleanse Hong Kong people. We would rather die with dignity than to live as slaves.
